ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Ant[onii] Quaerenghi Hexametri Carminis Libri Sex
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Rhapsodiae variorum Carminum Libri V. Ad Serenissimum Urbini Ducem Franc[escu]m Mariam II Feltrium de Ruvere
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur, si videbitur Reverend. Sacr. Pal. Apost. Mag. Caesar Fidelis Vicesgerens. In his carminum libris Clarissimi, doctissimiq; viri Antonij Quaerenghi Referendarij Apostolici, quos mandante Reverendiss. P. Sacri Palatij Magistro perlegi, nihil reperi quod pias aures offendat. Quum vero singularem praeseferant eruditionem, miram facilitatem, plurissimumq; Latini sermonis nitorem, edendos quam primum censeo Reip. litteraria bono. Hieronym. Aleander Imprimatur Fr. Greg. Donatus Rom. Mag. Reveren. Sacr. Palatij Apost. Mag. Soc. Ord. Praed.

Dedicatees.ItacPersonItem: della Rovere,Francesco Maria II,Duke of Urbino,1549-1631

Essay.EssayTitle: Ad Petrum Aldobrandinum Cardinalem Patavinae Academiae nomine

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
